commands: vite install # should install packages first
vite pm prune --help # should show help
vite pm prune && cat package.json # should prune extraneous dependencies
vite pm prune --prod && cat package.json # should prune dev dependencies
vite pm prune --no-optional && cat package.json # should prune optional dependencies
vite pm prune --prod --no-optional && cat package.json # should prune both dev and optional dependencies
vite pm prune -- --loglevel=warn && cat package.json # should support pass through arguments
